location: Dropped by a Night's Cavalry (mounted spectral rider) that patrols at night near Castle Morne. Night's Cavalry only spawn during the in-game night cycle — rest at a grace and wait for nightfall if none is active.
tactics: Wait for nightfall near Castle Morne — this is one of the earliest, most convenient Night's Cavalry fights in the game
These riders hit hard and are mounted — knocking them off their horse or fighting in tight terrain limits their speed
It's a farmable regular enemy, not a unique boss, so you can retry if you die
lore: The signature weapon of the Night's Cavalry, spectral horsemen who ride burning steeds after dark — its extra spiked heads make it a heavier, more vicious cousin of the standard Flail.

builds.name: Dexterity bleed
builds.why: E Strength / C Dexterity — notably better than the base Flail, a strong pick for a Dex bleed build especially with a Keen affinity
